textByHashes.6e50d250a80fe018799ff15b51a1c20e8fe49619: Sorry, human, but I'm not particularly interested in making conversation with those that I don't trust.
textByHashes.84202db7313779c0d0b0a1c26518bdcaef4dbd1d: I have some farming supplies. Why not take a look?
textByHashes.a677199aa645ef5346139eb3d86237c2ebd7f271: This is where I live, human.
textByHashes.28eb08e08f202fc1c555f52a0f7f6c0cdf4edc08: It is too busy there. Besides, I wanted to be closer to a spot that would be suitable for coral propagation.
textByHashes.184715ed4c393fd1f5814b1e04edab28de47be49: Yes. If you wish to try it yourself, just head down to the seabed.
textByHashes.2a7ee0740d25be2b6957cfe2b5c068f4e2b79305: No. I used to just focus on farming, but I found coral propagation to be similar in many ways, while also being far more interesting.
